MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jan-16-2015 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. LISA D. DUBOWSKI of Michael & Associates, Tel No. (805) 379-8505 appearing telephonically for the Plaintiff;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT FRED SIU'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE AND VACATE DEFAULT is denied WITH PREJUDICE. Defendant has not established any statutory grounds for setting aside the default. PLAINTIFF SHALL PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/AJR)
